subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who was when naught else had being beside Him, and Who shall ever remain as He hath been. He hath sent down the laws and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان و لم یکن معه من شیء و یکون بمثل ما قد کان قد انزل الشرایع و
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @soul; spirit after death, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing
